prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large brown metal cylinder
  - obj_1: small cyan rubber sphere
  - obj_2: small blue rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: small purple rubber cube
  - obj_4: small brown rubber cylinder
  - obj_5: large brown rubber cylinder
  - obj_6: small brown rubber cube
  - obj_7: small purple metal cube
  - obj_8: small cyan metal cylinder
  - obj_9: large blue metal cube

Questions:
[qrr_0301] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0302] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0309] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0310] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0311] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0312] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0313] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D positions of objects in the scene and compare distances between pairs of objects.

Let me identify the approximate positions of each object:
- obj_0 (large brown metal cylinder): center-left area, middle depth
- obj_1 (small cyan rubber sphere): front-right area
- obj_2 (small blue rubber cylinder): far back area
- obj_3 (small purple rubber cube): right-back area
- obj_4 (small brown rubber cylinder): right-front area
- obj_5 (large brown rubber cylinder): front-center area
- obj_6 (small brown rubber cube): left-front area
- obj_7 (small purple metal cube): left-back area
- obj_8 (small cyan metal cylinder): back-center area
- obj_9 (large blue metal cube): right-center area

Now let me estimate distances for the comparisons. First, let me estimate obj_1 to obj_5 distance:
- obj_1 (cyan sphere) is right-front
- obj_5 (large brown rubber cylinder) is front-center
- Distance seems moderate, roughly 3-4 units

Let me work through each question:

[qrr_0301] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_2-obj_7: obj_2 is far back, obj_7 is left-back - moderate distance. obj_1-obj_5 seems similar or less.
[qrr_0302] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_2-obj_8: both are in the back area, fairly close together. obj_1-obj_5 is likely greater.
[qrr_0303] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_2-obj_9: obj_2 back, obj_9 right - large distance. obj_1-obj_5 is less.
[qrr_0304] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_3-obj_4: obj_3 right-back, obj_4 right-front - moderate distance. Similar to obj_1-obj_5.
[qrr_0305] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_3-obj_6: obj_3 right-back, obj_6 left-front - large distance. obj_1-obj_5 is less.
[qrr_0306] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_3-obj_7: both are in the back area, moderate distance. Similar or obj_1-obj_5 greater.
[qrr_0307] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_3-obj_8: obj_3 right-back, obj_8 back-center - moderate. Similar.
[qrr_0308] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_3-obj_9: obj_3 back-right, obj_9 right - moderate. Similar to obj_1-obj_5.
[qrr_0309] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_4-obj_6: obj_4 right-front, obj_6 left-front - moderate distance. Similar.
[qrr_0310] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_4-obj_7: obj_4 right-front, obj_7 left-back - large distance. obj_1-obj_5 is less.
[qrr_0311] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_4-obj_8: obj_4 right-front, obj_8 back - large. obj_1-obj_5 less.
[qrr_0312] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_4-obj_9: obj_4 right-front, obj_9 right-center - close. obj_1-obj_5 greater.
[qrr_0313] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_6-obj_8: obj_6 left-front, obj_8 back - large. obj_1-obj_5 less.
[qrr_0314] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_6-obj_9: obj_6 left-front, obj_9 right - large. obj_1-obj_5 less.
[qrr_0315] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_7-obj_8: both back area, close together. obj_1-obj_5 greater.
[qrr_0316] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_7-obj_9: obj_7 left-back, obj_9 right - large. obj_1-obj_5 less.
[qrr_0317] obj_1-obj_5 vs obj_8-obj_9: obj_8 back, obj_9 right - moderate. Similar or obj_1-obj_5 less.
[qrr_0318] obj_1-obj_6 vs obj_2-obj_3: obj_1 right-front to obj_6 left-front - moderate. obj_2 far back to obj_3 right-back - moderate. Similar.
[qrr_0319] obj_1-obj_6 vs obj_2-obj_4: obj_2 far back to obj_4 right-front - large. obj_1-obj_6 less.
[qrr_0320] obj_1-obj_6 vs obj_2-obj_5: obj_2 far back to obj_5 front - very large. obj_1-obj_6 less.
